info.title: Outlets Service
info.description: Manages press outlets (publications) and their campaign relevance data. Scoped by org × brand × feature × campaign × workflow. Brand fields (brandName, industry, etc.) are fetched from brand-service — callers provide brandId via x-brand-id header and optionally pass featureInput as opaque context for LLM calls.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Must match OUTLETS_SERVICE_API_KEY env var.

patch.description: Requires x-campaign-id header to identify the campaign_outlets row.

post.description: Requires x-campaign-id and x-brand-id headers. All outlets in the batch share the same campaign and brand.

get.description: Returns outlet discovery stats (count, avg relevance, search queries used). Supports filtering by brandId, campaignId, workflowName and optional groupBy.

post.summary: Discover relevant outlets via Google search + LLM scoring
post.description: Requires x-campaign-id and x-brand-id headers. Fetches brand data from brand-service, generates search queries via LLM, searches Google via google-service, scores results for relevance via LLM, and bulk upserts discovered outlets. Pass featureInput as opaque context forwarded to LLM calls.

502.description: Upstream service error (brand-service, chat-service, or google-service)

post.summary: Pull the next best outlet from the buffer
post.description: Buffer-first strategy: returns the highest-scored open outlet for the campaign. If the buffer is empty, triggers a lightweight mini-discover (3 queries × 5 Google results, LLM scoring) to refill it, then returns the top result. Supports idempotency via optional idempotencyKey. Requires x-campaign-id and x-brand-id headers.

200.description: Next outlet from buffer (found: true) or no outlets available (found: false)

get.summary: All outlets for a campaign, sorted by relevance score descending

200.description: Campaign outlets sorted by relevance score (descending)
